title: IronWild
description: Explore untamed worlds, conquer new dimensions, and build powerful machines to automate everything.
body:
IronWild transforms Minecraft into a massive adventure sandbox where exploration, technology, and survival all evolve together.

Discover new biomes, encounter strange wildlife, conquer dangerous dimensions, and build complex automated factories that turn raw resources into powerful technology.

Whether you want to explore mysterious worlds, build massive industrial systems, or create a thriving base in the wilderness, IronWild gives you the freedom to play your way.


# 🌿 IronWild

IronWild is a large exploration and technology-focused modpack designed to expand Minecraft with new worlds, creatures, machines, and survival systems. The pack blends adventure, automation, and immersion to create a deeper survival experience that feels much bigger than vanilla Minecraft.

## 🌍 World & Exploration

The overworld is expanded with new biomes, underground cave systems, and naturally generated structures that reward exploration.

Hidden dungeons, mysterious ruins, and rare resources encourage players to travel far beyond their starting base.

With new wildlife and environmental variety, every journey into the wild feels unique.

## ⚙️ Technology & Automation

IronWild features powerful tech mods that allow players to create complex machines and automated systems.

Build everything from simple farms to massive industrial factories.

Major technology mods include:

Create – mechanical automation and contraptions

Mekanism – advanced technology and resource processing

Immersive Engineering – large industrial multiblock machines

Applied Energistics 2 – digital storage and automation networks

These systems allow players to build fully automated production lines and large-scale infrastructure.

## 🗺️ New Dimensions

Adventure goes far beyond the overworld.

IronWild includes several unique dimensions filled with bosses, treasures, and progression challenges.

Explore worlds such as:

The Aether

Deeper Darker

Expanded cave and underground worlds

Each dimension offers new enemies, environments, and powerful rewards.

## 🐾 Creatures & Wildlife

The world is filled with new creatures that make exploration more exciting and unpredictable.

Different regions feature unique wildlife and dangerous monsters, creating a living ecosystem across the world.

## 🍳 Farming & Food

Survival is enhanced with expanded farming and cooking systems.

Players can grow new crops, cook diverse meals, and create farms that integrate into automation systems.

## 🏗️ Building & Creativity

IronWild includes a large collection of building blocks and decorative additions.

Build anything from:

Large industrial factories

Cozy villages

Automated megabases

Hidden underground labs

The pack supports both technical players and creative builders.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### 🔧 Performance & Requirements

Recommended system requirements:

Minimum

6 GB RAM allocated

Recommended

8 GB RAM allocated

SSD storage

Modern CPU

Performance optimization mods are included to maintain smooth gameplay.



### 👥 Multiplayer

IronWild is fully compatible with multiplayer servers.

Exploring dimensions, building factories, and discovering new structures together makes the experience even more rewarding.
